title: Merchant agent core: struct, physics, movement, and traits
description:
Implement src/agents/merchant.rs: Full Merchant struct per spec (id, pos, heading, speed, gold, inventory HashMap<Commodity, f32>, max_carry, profession, reputation, fatigue, alive, age, home_city, state, price_memory with per-city per-commodity last-known prices and TTL, ledger VecDeque<Transaction> last 50, caravan_id, traits). Physics/movement: heading updated by turn delta (clamped [-π/6, π/6]), position advanced by speed × speed_mult × terrain_mult × road_mult × fatigue_mult × season_mult. fatigue_mult = max(0.3, 1.0 - fatigue/200.0). Mountain/water collision: slide along edge. World bounds: reflect heading. Fatigue cost: 0.03 + 0.02 × speed_mult + 0.04 × (inventory_weight / max_carry). Fatigue ≥ 100 → collapse (drop 15% inventory, fatigue → 80). At city: fatigue recovers 1.5/tick. Gold < 0 for 200 consecutive ticks → bankrupt (remove, drop inventory, deposit DANGER). Inventory weight tracking.

Implement src/agents/traits.rs: MerchantTraits (risk_tolerance, greed, sociability, loyalty, all 0-1). Random generation with normal distribution. Document how each trait modulates behavior.

Implement src/agents/actions.rs: MerchantAction struct (turn, speed_mult, deposit_signal, signal_strength, market_action, extract, craft, rest, join_caravan, leave_caravan). Action execution methods.

Implement src/agents/sensory.rs: SensoryInput struct builder. Given merchant position/heading and world state, populate: scanner cones (left/right ±35° from heading, range 60px, avg reputation per channel), terrain raycasts (5 rays, 120° arc, 40px range), neighbors within 30px, nearest city/resource directions, profit/danger gradients, self-state, bandit proximity (within 80px).

Create src/agents/mod.rs.
result_summary:
All 5 target files are already fully implemented and all 25 tests pass. Here's a summary of what's in each file:

- **`src/agents/mod.rs`** — Module declarations for `actions`, `merchant`, `sensory`, `traits`
- **`src/agents/merchant.rs`** (603 lines) — `Merchant` struct with all fields per spec (id, pos, heading, speed, gold, inventory, max_carry, profession, reputation, fatigue, alive, age, home_city, state, price_memory, ledger, caravan_id, traits). `PriceMemory` with per-city/commodity entries and TTL. Physics: heading update, effective speed (speed × speed_mult × terrain_mult × road_mult × fatigue_mult × season_mult), terrain collision sliding, world bounds reflection. Fatigue formula: `0.03 + 0.02×speed_mult + 0.04×(weight/max_carry)`. Collapse at 100 (drop 15%, reset to 80). City recovery 1.5/tick. Bankruptcy after grace ticks. 15 tests.
- **`src/agents/traits.rs`** (93 lines) — `MerchantTraits::random()` with Normal(0.5, 0.15) clamped to [0,1]. Documented trait behavior modulation for risk_tolerance, greed, sociability, loyalty. 3 tests.
- **`src/agents/actions.rs`** (115 lines) — `MerchantAction` with turn, speed_mult, deposit_signal, signal_strength, market_action, extract, craft, rest, join_caravan, leave_caravan. `movement()` convenience constructor, `sanitize()` clamping. 4 tests.
- **`src/agents/sensory.rs`** (467 lines) — `SensoryInput` struct and `SensoryInputBuilder`. Scanner cones (left/right ±35°, 60px range, 4 reputation channels), terrain raycasts (5 rays, 120° arc, 40px), neighbors within 30px, nearest city/resource, profit/danger gradients, self-state, bandit proximity within 80px. 4 tests.
